ddls:
CREATE TABLE "image_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image file */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path relative to the root directory */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the file */,
  "file_extension" TEXT /* File extension (e.g., .bmp, .jpg) */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the image file */,
  "correct_display" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the image can be correctly displayed */,
  "display_in_browser" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the image can be displayed in a browser */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Detailed notes and technical specifications for the image file */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the image file in bytes */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the file was uploaded */,
  "uploader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the file */,
  "is_deleted" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the file has been logically deleted */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* A unique identifier for the file content to ensure integrity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "file_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image file */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the file */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the version */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the image file in bytes for each version */,
  "uploader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the version */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* A unique identifier for the version content to ensure integrity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_file_versions_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES image_files ("file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "project_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project manager */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., active, completed, on hold) */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "actual_cost" TEXT /* Actual cost incurred for the project */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client for the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "file_projects" (
  "file_project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file-project association */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image file */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "assigned_date" TEXT /* Date when the file was assigned to the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the file within the project (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_file_projects_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES image_files ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_file_projects_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., project manager, developer, tester) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user for contact purposes */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the user account is active */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "file_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image file */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the file */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the file was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the file was accessed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_file_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_file_access_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES image_files ("file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "display_environments" (
  "environment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each display environment */,
  "environment_name" TEXT /* Name of the environment (e.g., Browser, Desktop) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the environment */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the display environment */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the environment is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("environment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "file_environments" (
  "file_environment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file-environment association */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image file */,
  "environment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the display environment */,
  "compatible" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the file is compatible with the environment */,
  "last_tested_date" TEXT /* Date when the file was last tested in the environment */,
  "test_results" TEXT /* Results of the last test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_environment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_file_environments_environment_id FOREIGN KEY ("environment_id") REFERENCES display_environments ("environment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_file_environments_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES image_files ("file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "file_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image file */,
  "metadata_key" TEXT /* Key of the metadata (e.g., resolution, color_mode) */,
  "metadata_value" TEXT /* Value of the metadata */,
  "metadata_type" TEXT /* Type of metadata (e.g., technical, display, usage) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the metadata was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the metadata was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_file_metadata_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES image_files ("file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "file_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image file */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag (e.g., paletted, 1-bit) */,
  "tag_type" TEXT /* Type of tag (e.g., category, feature, issue) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the tag was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the tag was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_file_tags_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES image_files ("file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "file_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image file */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was made */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "is_flagged" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the comment is flagged for review */,
  "flagged_reason" TEXT /* Reason for flagging the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_file_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_file_comments_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES image_files ("file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "file_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image file */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., edit, delete) */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  "is_reverted" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the change was reverted */,
  "reverted_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was reverted */,
  "reverted_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who reverted the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_file_history_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES image_files ("file_id")
)
